item.title: Police Crash Into Bar - Arrest Owner
item.description: December 18: St. Louis Police crash into gay bar, arrest owner for felony assault and “resisting” - witness says the owner “raised his hand and they said he hit them.” Video evidence shows no sign of physical violence and the police claim the shouting of obscenities is predicate for arrest. He’s currently being held without bond in an obvious attempt at intimidation by the City… hoping this can go viral https://www.riverfronttimes.com/news/st-louis-police-file-felony-charge-against-bar-pm-owner-after-suv-crash-41472853
item.dc:creator: mrmeeseekslookatmee

item.title: Well, I'll be damned. Consequences, maybe?
item.description: Is the "finding out" commencing. Maybe this will embolden other courts to actually follow thr rule of law. Probably not, but maybe.

item.title: When the levee breaks
item.description:
In The Netherlands you'd be told to bag it yourself. The cashier is definitely not bagging anything for you.
Be nice to people, it's not that hard.

item.title: Bottom shelf copy cat meme dump.
item.description:
@@HileyNoteson yoooooooooooooooo
Join for the games! We've been playing Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) and Taco Supreme With The Sour Cream Mustache tax. We're doing another Bottom Shelf Community meme review TOMORROW (December 20) at 9:30 pm CST on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka We will be taking OC meme submissions today (Dec 19th) until 11:59 pm CST on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Dump #168 (Still Sick With a Cold Edition)

2
3
4
5
6
7
8 Eyebrows, eyebrows
9
10
11
12 RIP Tater Tot
13 Whooooooooooo is that cat IIIIIIIIIIII seee…..staring straight…..back at me?
14
15
16 Whenever dudes ask about my dating profile, which clearly states I’m nonbinary.
17
18 Christian propaganda makes things seem so metal.
19
20
21
22
23 *sigh*
24
25
26
27
28

31

36

item.title: Keeping London moving!
item.dc:creator: sigirides

item.title: TEETH. TEETH. TEETH. TEETH.
item.description:
Posting my recently completed orthodontic journey. I had a really hard time biting food and eating stuff like a normal person so I feel very lucky to be able to get this done. Here is day one when they installed my Carriere motion device.
Here is a drawing of the how the Carriere device on my lower teeth was attached with a replaceable elastic to a bracket on my upper molar. The tension was to yank my lower teeth to the back of my jaw to correct my slight under bite. I wore an Invisalign retainer on the top during this phase since we werent working on my upper tooth alignment yet. Here is a link to the video about the device https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Zq-pYpvP5es
After a few months of the Carriere device they installed my traditional train tracks.
Bands galore throughout the process to fix my shit.
During this visit and a few others they did “interproximal reduction” on a few of my bottom front teeth. Its basically a small strip of metal sandpaper that they run back and forth between the teeth that takes a teeny bit of surface away so the teeth can sit closer together. Here is video explaining IPR in detail if you’re interested - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zfQkHod0Kno
I took pictures at each major adjustment to make sure I remembered the newest band orientation
Progress!
The final holding pattern for the last few months. 2 bands on each side and a powerchain across the bottom.
Basically couldn’t talk for 2 months unless I took these out. But the point is to wear them as often as possible so I did
Last day!
My brand new rearranged mouth bones
In all their perfectly aligned glory
Top teeth before! Fuckin Yikes.
Top teeth after!
Cheese! Thanks for reading!
Finn with a xmas bow tax.
item.dc:creator: emilfunt4271

item.title: My humble submission
item.description: 16 year old rescue Chihuahua. His name is Bandit. FP EDIT: Thank you so much for all the love for my favorite little dude! Hug all your dogs for me!

item.title: A yearly reminder for all you secret santa folks.
item.description: Seriously. Don't even take pictures of the shipping box. I've already caught several people this year who have doxed themselves and their secret santas addresses. No one needs to see the fucking box! and absolutely no one has to see the goddamn label! Your cellphone edit might look good on your crappy phone, but its transparent when viewed at full res!
item.dc:creator: EaNasirsExcellentHighGradeCopper
